calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-20-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court ordered the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code Section 68608(b). Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-18-2018 Continued To Dec-18-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The self-represented plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to DEC-18-2018 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. ***The Court intends to dismiss this case pursuant to Government Code 68608(b) if there is no appearance at the next hearing and compliance.*** Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
